summary_en: Ｐ－Ｙｏｔｔａｖｉａ authorised a share buyback. Direct return of capital and a signal management views shares as undervalued.
summary_jp: Ｐ－Ｙｏｔｔａｖｉａが自己株式取得を決議。資本還元と株価評価のシグナル。

summary_en: ＭＲＫ　ＨＬＤ authorised a share buyback. Direct return of capital and a signal management views shares as undervalued.
summary_jp: ＭＲＫ　ＨＬＤが自己株式取得を決議。資本還元と株価評価のシグナル。

summary_en: まんだらけ authorised a share buyback. Direct return of capital and a signal management views shares as undervalued.
summary_jp: まんだらけが自己株式取得を決議。資本還元と株価評価のシグナル。

summary_en: ヨシコン authorised a share buyback. Direct return of capital and a signal management views shares as undervalued.
summary_jp: ヨシコンが自己株式取得を決議。資本還元と株価評価のシグナル。

summary_en: Tender offer disclosed for ミツバ. Take-private transaction removes the float and resets capital policy.
summary_jp: ミツバに対する公開買付を開示。非公開化により資本政策が再構築。

summary_en: Tender offer disclosed for 中部電力. Take-private transaction removes the float and resets capital policy.
summary_jp: 中部電力に対する公開買付を開示。非公開化により資本政策が再構築。

summary_en: Authorised buyback of up to 3,000,000 shares (6.5% of S/O) for ¥3.0bn, running 2026-05-15 through 2026-07-31. Combined with the ¥50 dividend, FY26 total payout reaches roughly 71% of guided net income.
summary_jp: 自己株式300万株（発行済の6.5%）上限30億円を2026年5月15日から7月31日まで取得決議。

summary_en: Annual DPS raised to ¥50 from ¥40 (+25%), lifting payout to approximately 31% of FY26 guided net income. Disclosure flags shift toward a more explicit total-return framework alongside the same-day buyback.
summary_jp: 年間配当を¥40から¥50へ25%増配、配当性向は約31%に上昇。総還元方針への一歩。

name_jp: シスメックス株式会社
summary_en: Board authorised a ¥15bn buyback covering up to 6,000,000 shares (1.4% of S/O), to be executed by 2026-12-31. First buyback of meaningful size since FY22.
summary_jp: 自己株式600万株（発行済の1.4%）上限150億円を2026年12月31日まで取得決議。

name_jp: 株式会社ベイカレント
summary_en: Mid-term plan update introduces explicit ROIC target of 30%+ and WACC disclosure of 7.5%, formalising the cost-of-capital framework requested by TSE. Previous plan referenced only operating margin.
summary_jp: 中計改定でROIC30%以上・WACC7.5%を明示。資本コスト経営への対応強化。

summary_en: Cancellation of 1,200,000 treasury shares (3.2% of S/O), effective 2026-05-30. Reduces overhang from prior buyback programme and signals discipline against re-issuance.
summary_jp: 自己株式120万株（発行済の3.2%）を2026年5月30日付で消却。

summary_en: Authorised buyback of up to 8,500,000 shares (1.0% of S/O) for ¥30.0bn, running through 2027-03-31. Funded from accumulated cash following character-IP licensing earnings surge.
summary_jp: 自己株式850万株（発行済の1.0%）上限300億円を2027年3月31日まで取得決議。

summary_en: Policy update commits to reducing cross-shareholdings to under 10% of consolidated net assets by FY28, from 14% currently. Names six specific holdings targeted for full divestment.
summary_jp: 政策保有株式を連結純資産比10%未満へ縮減方針を表明（現状14%）。

name_jp: 株式会社ユー・エス・エス
summary_en: Introduced progressive dividend policy: floor at current DPS of ¥70 with annual review based on adjusted EPS. Replaces prior payout-ratio-only framework. Payout-ratio floor raised to 60%.
summary_jp: 累進配当政策を導入。年間配当下限¥70・配当性向下限60%を明文化。

name_jp: 株式会社プラスアルファ・コンサルティング
summary_en: Authorised first-ever buyback of up to 600,000 shares (1.2% of S/O) for ¥1.5bn, through 2026-10-31. Funded out of accumulated cash from talent-management SaaS growth.
summary_jp: 上場後初の自己株取得。60万株（発行済1.2%）上限15億円を2026年10月末まで。

summary_en: Corporate governance report flips Principle 1-4 (cross-shareholdings) and 5-2 (capital-allocation policy) from explain to comply, codifying quantitative reduction targets and a documented investment-hurdle process.
summary_jp: コーポレートガバナンス報告書で原則1-4・5-2をエクスプレインからコンプライへ変更。

summary_en: Executive compensation revised to add ROIC (40% weight) and relative TSR (20% weight) to the long-term incentive formula, replacing prior pure-net-income linkage. Effective FY27.
summary_jp: 役員報酬制度改定。長期インセンティブにROIC（40%）と相対TSR（20%）を導入。

name_jp: フューチャー株式会社
summary_en: Authorised buyback of up to 2,000,000 shares (4.0% of S/O) for ¥2.5bn, executable through 2026-09-30. Third consecutive year of double-digit-percent buyback authorisations.
summary_jp: 自己株式200万株（発行済4.0%）上限25億円を2026年9月末まで取得決議。

name_jp: 株式会社ドリーム・アーツ
summary_en: Management buyout tender announced at ¥3,400 per share (+38% premium to 1-month VWAP), valuing equity at ¥18.5bn. Founder-CEO leads the consortium with PE backing; tender runs through 2026-04-30.
summary_jp: MBO実施。TOB価格¥3,400（1か月VWAP+38%）、買付期間2026年4月30日まで。

summary_en: Special dividend of ¥25 per share announced alongside FY26 results, on top of recurring ¥40 DPS. Combined payout lifts FY26 ratio to roughly 72% from 44% prior year. Cash position cited as the source.
summary_jp: 通常配当¥40に加え特別配当¥25を実施。FY26配当性向は約72%に上昇。

name_jp: 株式会社ゴールドウイン
summary_en: Authorised buyback of up to 3,500,000 shares (4.2% of S/O) for ¥35.0bn, executable through 2027-02-13. Largest single authorisation in the company's history, funded from The North Face Japan licensing cash.
summary_jp: 自己株式350万株（発行済4.2%）上限350億円を2027年2月13日まで取得決議。

summary_en: Inaugural 'management conscious of cost of capital and stock price' disclosure published, naming ROE 15% and ROIC 18% as FY28 targets, plus PBR 2.0x as a stated discipline reference.
summary_jp: 資本コスト・株価を意識した経営の初回開示。ROE15%・ROIC18%・PBR2倍を目標化。

summary_en: Authorised buyback of up to 6,000,000 shares (1.9% of S/O) for ¥25.0bn, through 2026-08-31. Disclosed as part of a stated 60% total-return-ratio commitment under the new mid-term plan.
summary_jp: 自己株式600万株（発行済1.9%）上限250億円を2026年8月末まで。総還元60%方針。

summary_en: Annual DPS raised to ¥95 from ¥75 (+27%) and payout ratio floor lifted from 50% to 65%. Company cites stable recurring fee income from aircraft-lease arrangement fees.
summary_jp: 年間配当を¥75から¥95へ27%増配。配当性向下限を50%から65%へ引き上げ。

name_jp: 大塚ホールディングス株式会社
summary_en: Three-year programme committing to dispose of ¥80bn in listed cross-shareholdings (about 35% of the current book) by FY28, with annual progress disclosure. Replaces case-by-case approach.
summary_jp: 政策保有株式を3年で¥800億（簿価の約35%）縮減する方針を公表。

summary_en: Cancellation of 1,800,000 treasury shares (3.7% of S/O) effective 2026-01-31, retiring stock acquired under the FY25 buyback programme. Reduces total shares outstanding and supports per-share metrics.
summary_jp: 自己株式180万株（発行済の3.7%）を2026年1月31日付で消却。

summary_en: Reported completion of buyback executed 2025-11-26 to 2025-12-19: 700,000 shares acquired for ¥909.98M, equating to 2.2% of post-treasury S/O at an average price of approximately ¥1,300.
summary_jp: 11月26日〜12月19日に70万株・9.0998億円（発行済2.2%）の自社株買いを完了。

name_jp: 日本オラクル株式会社
summary_en: Annual DPS raised to ¥160 from ¥130 (+23%), with payout ratio lifted from 55% to roughly 67%. Company restates 'capital-efficient growth' as one of two pillars in the FY26 plan.
summary_jp: 年間配当を¥130から¥160へ23%増配。配当性向は55%から約67%へ。

summary_en: Mid-term plan refresh names ROIC 25% as a continuing standard and adds explicit WACC of 6.0% as the discipline reference. Capital-allocation table now appears in main IR deck.
summary_jp: 中計でROIC25%目標を維持、WACC6.0%を明示。資本配分表をIR資料に明示掲載。

name_jp: 株式会社シグマクシス・ホールディングス
summary_en: Policy update commits to fully divesting all remaining cross-shareholdings by FY27, reducing the book from ¥2.8bn to zero. Annual disposal pace and individual issue list disclosed.
summary_jp: 政策保有株式をFY27までに全廃する方針を公表（簿価¥28億→ゼロ）。

name_jp: 株式会社船井総研ホールディングス
summary_en: Director compensation overhauled: long-term incentive now weighted 50% to ROIC threshold (≥20%) and 30% to TSR vs. TOPIX, replacing the prior fixed-bonus structure. Effective FY26.
summary_jp: 役員報酬制度改定。長期インセンティブをROIC50%・対TOPIX TSR30%に再設計。

name_jp: シスメックス株式会社
summary_en: Cancellation of 2,500,000 treasury shares (0.6% of S/O), effective 2025-10-15. Follows the FY24 buyback programme and reduces treasury holdings to under 1% of issued shares.
summary_jp: 自己株式250万株（発行済の0.6%）を2025年10月15日付で消却。

summary_en: Tender offer launched by founding management with PE consortium at ¥1,180 per share, a 42% premium to 3-month VWAP, valuing equity at roughly ¥15bn. Tender runs through 2025-10-27.
summary_jp: 創業者主導のMBO。TOB価格¥1,180（3か月VWAP+42%）、買付期間10月27日まで。

name_jp: イー・ギャランティ株式会社
summary_en: Adopted progressive dividend policy with explicit non-decrease commitment and a payout-ratio floor of 50%. Annual DPS simultaneously raised to ¥36 from ¥30 (+20%).
summary_jp: 累進配当を導入。配当性向下限50%・減配なしを明文化。配当¥30→¥36へ20%増配。

name_jp: ジャパンマテリアル株式会社
summary_en: Corporate governance report flips Principle 1-4 (cross-shareholdings) and 5-2 (capital-allocation) from explain to comply, adding quantitative reduction targets and a documented hurdle rate of 12%.
summary_jp: コーポレートガバナンス報告書で原則1-4・5-2をコンプライへ変更、ハードルレート12%を明示。

summary_en: First 'management conscious of cost of capital' disclosure published, naming ROIC 30% as continuing target and introducing an explicit ¥7.3bn net-cash deployment framework over FY25-FY27.
summary_jp: 資本コスト経営の初回開示。ROIC30%目標を維持、ネットキャッシュ¥73億の活用方針を提示。
